description_long: This is a rounded, white ceramic cup with a smooth, glossy finish and a single, sturdy handle. The front of the cup features a distinctive graphic with the words 'Kobra Slayer' in green and black, accompanied by a stylized sword and snake motif. The cup's body is bulbous, tapering slightly at the top to form a wide opening suitable for drinking. The handle is ergonomically shaped, allowing for a comfortable grip. The surface is mostly unadorned except for the front-facing artwork, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The interior appears to be hollow and smooth, designed to hold liquids.
description: A white, rounded ceramic cup with a handle and a 'Kobra Slayer' graphic on the front. It has a glossy finish and a wide opening.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Kobra Slayer' graphic and the handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible graphics or text.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, showing the cup's smooth, unadorned surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no handle or graphics visible, highlighting the cup's plain surface.
